title: Mapping RGB face video data to core body temperature (RAKSHAK)
description: Preprocessed and augmented image datasets (resizing, flipping, brightness adjustment) to improve model robustness. Developed CNN Re-colorization approach for RGB-to-NIR image conversion, evaluated with MSE & human assessment. Applied postprocessing (joint bilateral filter, contrast/saturation adjustment) to reduce noise and enhance visibility. Built a CNN-based approach to predict temperature from images, achieving 52% accuracy.

title: English to Hindi Language translation
description: Explored and Experimented with various Transformer-based and Recurrent Neural Network models and referenced multiple researches of state-of-the-art Machine Translation models to build a model that can perform machine translation from English to Hindi Language.

title: Test Case Prioritization
description: Implemented a research, taking prioritizing test cases in a CI context as a Ranking problem and modelling a prioritizing agent in a CI environment as a Reinforcement Learning Problem. This uses one of the ranking approches discussed in the researchto build the learning model.

title: Hashtag Analysis
description: Pulling Tweet data using Twitter API and Web-scraping posts from Koo (twitter-like social media) to create networks around popular social topics. Analyse networks to understand the spread of topics and movements in a social network and learn about patterns that make a movement successful.

title: Parsing Large scale bibliography data
description: Pulling data from a PubMed database and parsing required information into CSV files. Building Networks as larger as 122 million nodes from the parsed data for further analysis.

title: Reinforcement Learning - TicTacToe
description: This is a simple implementation of a Reinforcement Learning agent that learns without any neural network, future searches, possible outcomes, etc. but by simple trials. This allows good performace with less computational power in simple games.

title: The Learners Tab
description: Researching existing products and getting customer requirements from university students, especially programmers. Building the app using React, Node and various public APIs.

title: 3D Portfolio Website
description: A portfolio website built on react-three-fiber (a react renderer for Three.js). It has a 3D office room design which can be explored and has portfolio details displayed in objects around the room. Starts with a normal 2D portfolio website on home URL with the 3D website accessible a another route. [Under Development]

title: Github Repo Organizer
description: A simple yet great way to organize your repositories in github. This supports automatic grouping of the repos based on a specified naming convention and an easy-to-navigate view which makes it easy to go through your repositories

title: Art Showcasing Website
description: A Website design for Art showcase that support user authentication, categorizing, tags, likes, etc using React and firebase. [Under Development]

title: 3D Room Design
description: A simple 3d room design made entirely using HTML and CSS, without any Javascript or 3D libraries like threejs.

title: Remote Mouse
description: An android application to use on an android phone as an air mouse pointer for a computer. Uses bluetooth to transfer data to the computer server from android device through sockets.

title: X-86 Architecture Operating System
description: Built a basic operating system which boots in 32-bit mode and has a keyboard driver for inputs and VGA driver for output. Also has a shell which performs very basic tasks.

title: Edge based knowledge inference for intelligent vehicular networks
description: Experimented with approaches to reduce the amount of data transfered between vehicles and Road-Side-Units(RSUs) to reduce the processing power required at RSUs and make it possible to perform calculations on Lower layers instead of data transfers at higher levels.

title: Firewatch Design
description: A Web animation artwork inspired by the game 'Fire Watch', made in vanilla Js. It is a 24-hr day-night cycle animation that runs inifinitely.
